name: ckeditor5-custom-build
author: CKSource
description: Custom CKEditor 5 balloon block build for xprez.

scripts.build: esbuild src/ckeditor.js --bundle --minify --format=iife --outfile=build/ckeditor.js && cp build/ckeditor.js build/ckeditor.css ../../../static/ck_editor/libs/ck_editor/ && rm -rf build
